testcase.name: Blank user name Entry Error Show Up
Blank Password Entry Error Show Up
Successfull Login & log out of a New User

error.message: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence

testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Successfull Login & log out of a New User # src/test/resources/1_Login.feature:33 Given I Open my computers "chrome" browser # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_open_my_computers_browser(java.lang.String) And I browse to mct website using url "https://www.demo.iscripts.com/multicart/demo/index.php" # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_browse_to_website(java.lang.String) And I click on login link # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_click_on_login_link() And I click on signup button # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_click_on_signup_button() When I complete the registration form for a new "userxy004" # stepdefinationcode.DomainSteps.i_complete_the_registration_form(java.lang.String) java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebElement.sendKeys(RemoteWebElement.java:96) at pageobjectmodel.PageParent.enterValueOnWebElement(PageParent.java:52) at pageobjectmodel.RegistrationPage.completeREgistrationWithUser(RegistrationPage.java:47) at stepdefinationcode.DomainSteps.i_complete_the_registration_form(DomainSteps.java:20) at ✽.I complete the registration form for a new "userxy004"(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/Mct_Automation_Framework/src/test/resources/1_Login.feature:35)
Then I expect my profile name text as "Mr Auto userxy004" # stepdefinationcode.AllValidationSteps.i_expect_my_profile_name_text(java.lang.String) And I logout for the user # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_log_Out()
Embedding screenShots [image/png 97382 bytes]
testcase.system-err: Apr 10, 2026 10:26:33 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 10, 2026 10:26:33 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.55. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Forgot Password Reover

failure.message: Failed to Find Correct Profile Name!! expected:<[please correct the following errors to continue! * this email has not been registered!]> but was:<[a error ]>

testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: Failed to Find Correct Profile Name!! expected:<[please correct the following errors to continue! * this email has not been registered!]> but was:<[a error ]>
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Forgot Password Reover # src/test/resources/1_Login.feature:40 Given I Open my computers "chrome" browser # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_open_my_computers_browser(java.lang.String) And I browse to mct website using url "https://www.demo.iscripts.com/multicart/demo/index.php" # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_browse_to_website(java.lang.String) And I click on login link # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_click_on_login_link() And I click on forgotpassword link # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.iClickOnForgotpasswordLink() And I enter regemail as "abc@aa.bb" # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.iEnterRegemailAs(java.lang.String) When I click on reset password button # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.iClickOnResetPasswordButton() Then I validate a error text as "a error " # stepdefinationcode.AllValidationSteps.iValidateAErrorTextAs(java.lang.String) org.junit.ComparisonFailure: Failed to Find Correct Profile Name!! expected:<[please correct the following errors to continue! * this email has not been registered!]> but was:<[a error ]> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at stepdefinationcode.AllValidationSteps.iValidateAErrorTextAs(AllValidationSteps.java:125) at ✽.I validate a error text as "a error "(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/Mct_Automation_Framework/src/test/resources/1_Login.feature:44)

testcase.name: Error on Existing User Registration.

error.message: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence

testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Error on Existing User Registration. # src/test/resources/2_CreateAccount.feature:13 Given I Open my computers "chrome" browser # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_open_my_computers_browser(java.lang.String) And I browse to mct website using url "https://www.demo.iscripts.com/multicart/demo/index.php" # stepdefinationcode.CommonSteps.i_browse_to_website(java.lang.String) And I click on login link # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_click_on_login_link() And I click on signup button # stepdefinationcode.CommonPageActions.i_click_on_signup_button() When I complete the registration form for a new "user008" # stepdefinationcode.DomainSteps.i_complete_the_registration_form(java.lang.String) java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Keys to send should be a not null CharSequence at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebElement.sendKeys(RemoteWebElement.java:96) at pageobjectmodel.PageParent.enterValueOnWebElement(PageParent.java:52) at pageobjectmodel.RegistrationPage.completeREgistrationWithUser(RegistrationPage.java:47) at stepdefinationcode.DomainSteps.i_complete_the_registration_form(DomainSteps.java:20) at ✽.I complete the registration form for a new "user008"(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/Mct_Automation_Framework/src/test/resources/2_CreateAccount.feature:15)
Then I expect existing reg error name text as "Please correct the following errors to continue!* User Name already exists!* The email address is already in use!.Terms & Conditions cannot be empty !" # stepdefinationcode.AllValidationSteps.validateExistRegregError(java.lang.String)
